typography.instructions: NEVER use Inter or generic sans for headings. Apply fluid typography. Use tight tracking for headings and wide tracking for small overlines/labels.

colors.instructions: Modify index.css to enforce these dark mode HSL variables as the default :root variables. Do not rely on the 'dark' class, make the root these colors for a persistent industrial dark theme. Ensure text meets APCA contrast standards.

visual_enhancers.surfaces: Use 'Grid Borders' pattern for the dashboard structure. Containers use border-collapse style layout. Subtle 1px borders on right and bottom of every grid item. No soft shadows; use sharp edges or max 4px (rounded-sm) radius.
visual_enhancers.effects: Subtle noise overlay (grain texture) across the background to avoid digital flatness. Hover states should brighten backgrounds and elevate elements slightly (-translate-y-1).
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: For sticky headers or floating navs, use backdrop-blur-xl with bg-background/80 and a 1px delicate inner stroke (border-border). NEVER use completely transparent backgrounds under content.

layouts.landing_page: High impact, full screen height. Background image covered with bg-background/80 overlay. Centered composition for 'Under Construction'.
layouts.dashboard: High Density Grid. Fixed sidebar navigation. Main content area starts with breadcrumbs/header. The modules are arranged in a responsive grid (1 col mobile, 2 col tablet, 3-4 col desktop).
layouts.master_dispatch: Split view or step-based layout. Top: File upload area (dashed border, generous padding). Middle: Extracted data form (editable grid of inputs). Bottom: Dispatch records table.
layouts.spacing: Generous spacing. p-6 or p-8 for cards. gap-6 for grids.

components.buttons: Sharp corners or rounded-sm radius. Primary buttons use the safety orange background (bg-primary) with white text. Hover state must be a lighter hue. Include interaction animations (scale-95 on active).
components.cards: Flat background (bg-card), 1px solid border (border-border), no shadow by default. Hover adds slight lift and shadow-lg.
components.inputs: Shadcn inputs customized with sharp edges, bg-background, focus:ring-primary focus:ring-2.
components.tables: Shadcn table. Striped rows or border-b on cells. Hover effects on rows.

motion.interactions: Hover states on all interactive elements. Buttons scale down slightly on active. Accordions for sidebar menus. Staggered entrance animations for dashboard module cards.
motion.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Decorative animations must have aria-hidden='true'.

icons.instructions: Use Phosphor Icons (duotone or bold variants) for a technical/industrial feel. Add 'yarn add @phosphor-icons/react' to dependencies.

images.description: Welding sparks in darkness - perfect for Grewal Engineering Work. Requires a heavy dark overlay (bg-black/70 or bg-background/80).
Black metallic surface with oval textures. Can be used at very low opacity (5%) as a background texture.

media.3d_libraries: Not strictly necessary for this dashboard. Focus on 2D high-contrast UI.

accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (kebab-case, role-based).
accessibility.contrast: Normal text minimum 4.5:1. Use Text Shadow over images where needed. Ensure focus states have higher contrast than default state.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react sonner recharts
IMPORTANT: You have .js files not .tsx files. Generate all React components with .js or .jsx extensions. Do not output .tsx files.
Modify tailwind.config.js to include fonts (Chivo, IBM Plex Sans, JetBrains Mono) and enforce dark theme colors.
Update index.css to map the provided HSL color variables to the root (force dark mode globally for the industrial theme).
Remove default App.css text-align: center and generic styles.
Build Shadcn UI components for Buttons, Cards, Inputs, Tables, Dialogs, Selects, and Sonner Toasts in .js files.
Create the 'Under Construction' landing page route as the public facing root (/). Use the provided background image.
Create the authenticated Dashboard layout with a Sidebar.
Implement the Dashboard overview with Module Cards.
Implement the Master Dispatch Entry module (PDF Upload, form, table).
Implement placeholders for other modules with 'Coming Soon' state.
Ensure 100% responsiveness across Desktop, Tablet, and Mobile views.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts (except landing page hero), simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and crisp borders.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all). Add transitions for specific interactive properties.
You MUST NOT center align the app container in css.
Use modern button styles (sharp or slightly rounded) with interaction animations & color relevant to the industrial style.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures and selection states separate good from extraordinary.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
